properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Nearer, my God, to Thee, nearer to Thee! E'en though it be a cross, that raiseth me! Still all my song shall be, Nearer, my God to Thee!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Nearer, my God to Thee Nearer to Thee!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Though like the wanderer, the sun gone down Darkness be over me, my rest a stone Yet in my dreams I'd be, Nearer, my God to Thee.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Then, with my waking thoughts, bright with Thy praise Out of my stony grief, Bethel I'll raise So by my woes to be, Nearer my God, to Thee.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Or if on joyful wing, cleaving the sky Sun, moon and stars forgot, upward I fly Still all my song shall be, Nearer my God, to Thee.
